markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Swoogo and GrowthX to discuss content marketing performance and strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/zL7tHNLrU61tJ1v6ghtxkDPgsh6CYzFZ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content efforts showing positive results: 20% of blog clicks, 27% of impressions from new/refreshed content](https://fathom.video/share/zL7tHNLrU61tJ1v6ghtxkDPgsh6CYzFZ?tab=summary&timestamp=156.0)
  - [Need for better tracking of qualified leads from blog content](https://fathom.video/share/zL7tHNLrU61tJ1v6ghtxkDPgsh6CYzFZ?tab=summary&timestamp=412.0)
  - [Discussion on implementing B2B visitor identification tool (e.g., Koala) to better understand site traffic](https://fathom.video/share/zL7tHNLrU61tJ1v6ghtxkDPgsh6CYzFZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1456.0)
  - [Importance of patience: full impact of content strategy will take time to materialize](https://fathom.video/share/zL7tHNLrU61tJ1v6ghtxkDPgsh6CYzFZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1095.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Update

  - [New articles (40 published) generated 106 clicks, 15k impressions (17% of blog clicks, 20% of impressions)](https://fathom.video/share/zL7tHNLrU61tJ1v6ghtxkDPgsh6CYzFZ?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)
  - [Content refreshes (10 articles) showed 3x increase in clicks, 6x increase in impressions](https://fathom.video/share/zL7tHNLrU61tJ1v6ghtxkDPgsh6CYzFZ?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)
  - [Overall impact: new + refreshed content driving 20% of clicks, 27% of impressions for entire blog](https://fathom.video/share/zL7tHNLrU61tJ1v6ghtxkDPgsh6CYzFZ?tab=summary&timestamp=372.0)

### Content Cleanup Strategy

  - [Identifying duplicate/similar articles for redirection (e.g., virtual event topics from 2021 and 2022)](https://fathom.video/share/zL7tHNLrU61tJ1v6ghtxkDPgsh6CYzFZ?tab=summary&timestamp=497.0)
  - [Plan to review 5-10 articles weekly, optimizing \~150 total articles](https://fathom.video/share/zL7tHNLrU61tJ1v6ghtxkDPgsh6CYzFZ?tab=summary&timestamp=571.0)
  - [Prateek to send list of articles for redirection to Will for implementation](https://fathom.video/share/zL7tHNLrU61tJ1v6ghtxkDPgsh6CYzFZ?tab=summary&timestamp=555.0)

### Lead Tracking and Reporting

  - [Discussed journey mapping approach in HubSpot](https://fathom.video/share/zL7tHNLrU61tJ1v6ghtxkDPgsh6CYzFZ?tab=summary&timestamp=627.0)
  - [Challenge: distinguishing new content performance from overall blog performance](https://fathom.video/share/zL7tHNLrU61tJ1v6ghtxkDPgsh6CYzFZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1202.0)
  - [Suggestion: Add unique identifier to new blog URLs for better tracking](https://fathom.video/share/zL7tHNLrU61tJ1v6ghtxkDPgsh6CYzFZ?tab=summary&timestamp=412.0)
  - [Limited data available due to recent implementation (started Aug 26)](https://fathom.video/share/zL7tHNLrU61tJ1v6ghtxkDPgsh6CYzFZ?tab=summary&timestamp=752.0)

### B2B Visitor Identification

  - [Discussed implementing tools like Koala or RB2B (estimated $200-500/month)](https://fathom.video/share/zL7tHNLrU61tJ1v6ghtxkDPgsh6CYzFZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1456.0)
  - [Benefits: Identify high-value visitors, enable targeted follow-ups](https://fathom.video/share/zL7tHNLrU61tJ1v6ghtxkDPgsh6CYzFZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1456.0)
  - [Stacey considering for 2025 budget, but interested in piloting free version](https://fathom.video/share/zL7tHNLrU61tJ1v6ghtxkDPgsh6CYzFZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1630.0)

### SEO Impact and Expectations

  - [Jimmy highlighted importance of increased branded search queries as content efforts mature](https://fathom.video/share/zL7tHNLrU61tJ1v6ghtxkDPgsh6CYzFZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1095.0)
  - [Emphasized patience: full impact on lead generation takes 3-6 months](https://fathom.video/share/zL7tHNLrU61tJ1v6ghtxkDPgsh6CYzFZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
  - [Swoogo performing well compared to other GrowthX clients in early stages](https://fathom.video/share/zL7tHNLrU61tJ1v6ghtxkDPgsh6CYzFZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1325.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Mitch to work with Will on implementing free version of B2B visitor identification tool (Koala/RB2B)](https://fathom.video/share/zL7tHNLrU61tJ1v6ghtxkDPgsh6CYzFZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1881.0)
  - [Prateek to continue content cleanup efforts, sending redirect lists weekly](https://fathom.video/share/zL7tHNLrU61tJ1v6ghtxkDPgsh6CYzFZ?tab=summary&timestamp=555.0)
  - [Team to continue monitoring performance, with focus on increasing qualified traffic](https://fathom.video/share/zL7tHNLrU61tJ1v6ghtxkDPgsh6CYzFZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1193.0)
  - [Stacey to consider B2B visitor identification tool for 2025 budget](https://fathom.video/share/zL7tHNLrU61tJ1v6ghtxkDPgsh6CYzFZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1630.0)
  - [GrowthX to share best practices doc for CRO optimizations to convert blog traffic](https://fathom.video/share/zL7tHNLrU61tJ1v6ghtxkDPgsh6CYzFZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1164.0)
